description: The FinTech Technical Lead leads the design and development of secure, scalable financial technology systems including payments, digital banking, lending, and trading platforms.
responsibilities: Architect and lead FinTech platform development
Ensure compliance with financial regulations and security standards
Integrate payment gateways, banking APIs, and third-party services
Lead code reviews, technical decisions, and performance optimization
Collaborate with compliance, product, and risk teams

skills.name: Payments, wallets, lending, or trading systems
